name: C=Holdings B.V.
summary: C=Holdings B.V. manufactures and distributes 8-bit gaming computers. The company provides joysticks, video players, and compact discs (CDs). The company licenses its brands to third party manufacturers as well. C=Holdings B.V. was formerly known as Commodore International B.V. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Roosendaal, the Netherlands. C=Holdings B.V. is a former subsidiary of Asiarim Corporation.
